_comment: audiocore server config. One entry per loaded model id. Concurrency = N entries; requests on the same id serialize through that session. Copy this file, edit the 'path' fields to point at your local GGUFs, then run: audiocore_server --config your_server.json
_endpoints: POST /v1/audio/music    { model: 'ace-step-turbo',  caption: 'lo-fi piano', lyrics: '', duration: 30, guidance_scale: 7.5, steps: 8 }
